summary: Full E2E testing of VSM Bot Dashboard (FastAPI + React + Groq + MongoDB). 13/13 backend pytest cases passed, all UI flows verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Groq integration works (real reply mentioning VSM Collection generated in ~355ms via llama-3.1-8b-instant). All data-testids present and reachable; navigation, bot toggle, prompt editor, model dropdown, comportement toggles (6 found), WhatsApp connect, logs simulate (INFO/SUCCESS/WARN/ERROR pills), and responsive drawer (hamburger, overlay close, close-btn) all functional.

minor.issue: When bot_active=false, response model is 'n/a' and elapsed_ms/conversation_id are NOT returned (only reply+model). The frontend should tolerate this; spec says generic message which is satisfied.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/chat bot-off branch returns only {reply, model} without conversation_id; if a UI relies on conversation_id always being present it would break. Currently the Playground tolerates it via optional chaining, but worth normalizing.
server.py: stats.weekly_series base_values are hardcoded demo data (not actually derived from DB) — acceptable for demo but should be documented.
server.py: /api/transcribe uses bare except for file cleanup — fine but ruff-flagged style.
Mongo's _id is correctly excluded in queries and via cfg.pop('_id', None).
test_credentials: n/a — no auth (direct access as designed)
seed_data_creation: Used /api/chat to create real conversations; /api/logs/simulate creates 6 in-memory log entries. /api/whatsapp/connect persists state in bot_config doc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_vsm_backend.py (pytest, 13 tests). Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vsm_backend.py -v. All data-testids used in spec exist in the UI: sidebar, topbar, open-sidebar-btn, close-sidebar-btn, sidebar-overlay, nav-{key}-link (overview/conversations/playground/instructions/connexion/api/comportement/logs), bot-status-toggle, test-chat-input, send-message-btn, prompt-editor, model-selector-dropdown, config-save-btn, wa-connect-btn, logs-simulate-btn. Groq key is live and quota is fine. Whisper accepts a synthetic 1s 440Hz wav (test passes with 200 or 502).
